title: First Solar, Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: TEMPE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FSLR) (the “Company”) today announced financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023. Net sales for the second quarter were $811 million, an increase of $262 million from the prior quarter. The increase was primarily driven by an increase in the volume of modules sold, including the commencement of sales of the Company's next-generation Series 7 modules, and an increase in the average selling price (“ASP”) of our modules. text: TEMPE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AmericanSolar--First Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FSLR) announced that on June 30, 2023, it entered into a five-year revolving credit and guarantee facility for $1 billion.
